---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Safedump
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Be specific about the API or behavior.

## Alternatives Considered
What alternatives have you considered? Are there existing tools that partially solve this?

## User Impact
Who benefits from this? How many users? Is this for individual developers, teams, or CI systems?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
